warps.notes: Left exit door tile (back to town)
Right exit door tile (back to town)

tile_layout.notes: 10 columns x 8 rows. Warp events at (6,7) and (7,7) go to New Bark Town. Warp at (9,0) goes to stairs up. NPC Mom at (7,4) facing left in main state; at (2,2) morning, (0,2) night. Neighbor (PokemanFan_F) at (4,4) facing right. BG events: stove (0,1), sink (1,1), fridge (2,1), TV (4,1). Coord events at (8,4) and (9,4) trigger MeetMom scene.

npcs.name: Mom
npcs.dialogue_summary: Main Mom NPC. Greets player on first visit, gives Pokegear, sets clock/DST, explains phone. Later: saves prize money, buys decorations. Present when EVENT_PLAYERS_HOUSE_MOM_1 is set.

npcs.name: Mom (morning variant)
npcs.dialogue_summary: Mom's morning position (near stove). Same Bank of Mom script.

npcs.name: Mom (day variant)
npcs.dialogue_summary: Mom's daytime position (near table). Same Bank of Mom script.

npcs.name: Mom (night variant)
npcs.dialogue_summary: Mom's night position (near fridge). Same Bank of Mom script.

npcs.name: Neighbor (visiting woman)
npcs.dialogue_summary: Visiting neighbor. Greets player by time of day (morning/day/night). Says her daughter wants to be Elm's assistant because she loves Pokemon.

bg_events.description: Stove. Text: 'Mom's specialty! CINNABAR VOLCANO BURGER!'
Sink. Text: 'The sink is spotless. Mom likes it clean.'
Refrigerator. Text: 'FRESH WATER and tasty LEMONADE!'
TV. Text: Movie about two boys riding a train.

coord_events.notes: Player triggers Mom cutscene (approached from left)
Player triggers Mom cutscene (approached from right) — this is the main Pokegear-giving scene

items.name: Pokegear
items.notes: Also registers Mom's phone number (PHONE_MOM) and initiates clock setup

scene_scripts.description: Initial scene on first 1F visit. Mom gives Pokegear, sets clock, explains phone.
Normal state after Pokegear given. Mom is in Bank of Mom mode.

bank_of_mom.description: After EVENT_GAVE_MYSTERY_EGG_TO_ELM and talking to Mom again (EVENT_TALKED_TO_MOM_AFTER_MYSTERY_EGG_QUEST), Mom begins saving a portion of prize money. She calls periodically and may spend the savings on bedroom decorations.

notes: The ground floor of the player's starting home. Contains kitchen appliances (stove, sink, fridge), a TV, and a staircase to the bedroom. The Mom NPC has three time-of-day position variants (morning near stove, day near table, night near fridge) plus a primary version used in the initial Pokegear cutscene. A neighbor lady also visits. The coord_event at (9,4) triggers the Pokegear handoff scene if SCENE_PLAYERSHOUSE1F_MEET_MOM is active. Door at bottom leads back to New Bark Town; stairs at top-right lead to 2F player bedroom.
